input.memoryNote: You had front-row tickets to see Boygenius — you'd refreshed for an hour to get them. You found out I got laid off the same morning. You didn't go. You showed up with two bags of groceries, made pasta, and put on The Great British Bake Off without asking if that's what I wanted. It was exactly what I wanted. I never told you the tickets were front row until now.

meta.tiktokHook: My sister gave up front-row Boygenius tickets to make me pasta the night I got laid off. She never told me they were front row. I never told her I knew.
meta.caption: the real ones don't make you feel it
meta.whyItWorks: 'I never told you the tickets were front row until now' reframes the whole story as a secret being revealed for the first time — exactly what this product is for. This sample IS the product's thesis.
